name: Spicy Szechwan Sauteed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Hot bean paste or chili sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok with oil over high heat, then add garlic and ginger.
2. Stir in chicken pieces and cook for 2-2 1/2 minutes until browned.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except blanched broccoli flowerets and cornstarch.
4. Stir for a further 1-2 minutes, mixing well.
5. Thicken the sauce by stirring in the cornstarch.
6. Place chicken in the center of a dish with broccoli on each side.
